profile.title: AI/ML, Automation, Developer, Engineer
profile.tagline: Be swift, that platform ain't gonna tailor itself.
profile.philosophy: I build with a security-aware mindset. I know how things break.
profile.bio: I started tech in January 2026. I'm a builder — I don't just learn, I ship. I build Small Language Models, automate workflows with n8n and Python, and create frontends that people actually use. I'm currently running SynCorrazon (my startup) and Kaizora Academy (where I teach AI Automation). I'm also a participant in TRI AI (Google DeepMind), the FlyRank ML Internship, and the ATF AI Challenge. My friends call me Slime.

projects.name: Quiz App
projects.description: An interactive quiz application with score tracking, timed questions, and a clean, distraction-free interface.

projects.name: Rock, Paper, Scissors
projects.description: A fun game I play every now and then because all work and no play sucks.

projects.name: Building a small language model (lab)
projects.description: Built as part of the TRI AI program (Google DeepMind) — a small language model trained and evaluated end-to-end.

projects.name: Data Scraping Toolkit
projects.description: A set of Python scrapers and pipelines for collecting, cleaning, and structuring web data automatically.

ventures.name: SynCorrazon
ventures.description: My startup, building automation-first products for people who are tired of doing things by hand.

ventures.name: Kaizora Academy
ventures.description: Where I teach AI Automation — practical, project-based, built for people who want to ship, not just learn theory.

workExperience.description: Building and training agents that work, with guidance from the wonderful team.

certifications.name: Google IT Automation with Python Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Letting python do the repetitive work.

certifications.name: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate(v.2)
certifications.description: Hands-on cybersecurity training focused on defence and analysis.

certifications.name: Introduction To DevSecOps
certifications.description: Certification covering n8n workflow design, API integrations, and automated pipelines.

certifications.name: Build Your Own Small Language Model

chatbot.greeting: Hey! 👋 I'm Aceya's assistant. What's up?
chatbot.pivotMessage: I'm enjoying this chat! 😄 But let's talk about what you actually need. How can I help you today?
jokes: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs. 🐛
I told my computer I needed a break, and it froze. 🥶
There are 10 types of people in the world: those who understand binary, and those who don't.
Why do Python devs wear glasses? Because they can't C. 👓
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks: 'Can I join you?'
Why was the JavaScript developer sad? Because he didn't Node how to Express himself.
I'd tell you a UDP joke, but you might not get it.
Why did the automation engineer quit? Too many trigger warnings. 😄
How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None — that's a hardware problem.
Why do developers hate nature? Too many bugs, not enough documentation.
My code doesn't have bugs. It just develops random features.
Why did the AI go to therapy? Too many unresolved dependencies.
I'm not lazy, I'm just running on an efficient automation schedule. ⚙️

availability.days: I'm available Monday to Saturday. Sundays are offline. Expect a response on Monday.

chatbot.fallback: Sorry, I can't help you any further. You'd have to contact my maker (Aceya). Want me to show you how?
